stampCard.label: Stamp Card
stampCard.description: Reward your customers after a set number of visits. Digital punch cards that live in Apple & Google Wallet — no more lost paper cards.
stampCard.alt: Stamp card pass showing coffee shop loyalty stamps

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: Offer percentage or fixed discounts your customers can redeem in one tap. Track redemptions and set expiry dates automatically.
coupon.alt: Digital coupon pass with discount offer

membership.label: Membership
membership.description: Digital membership cards with tier-based benefits. Perfect for clubs, gyms, and loyalty tiers with optional holder photos.
membership.alt: Membership card pass with tier and member details

points.label: Points Program
points.description: Earn points per visit or purchase, then redeem from a custom reward catalog. Flexible point values and labels for any industry.
points.alt: Points program pass showing earned points balance

prepaid.label: Prepaid Pass
prepaid.description: Fixed-use passes that count down with each use. Rechargeable or one-time — great for class packs, service bundles, and transport.

giftCard.label: Gift Card
giftCard.description: Stored-value gift cards with real-time balance tracking. Customers check their balance right from their wallet — charges and refunds built in.
giftCard.alt: Gift card pass showing current balance

ticket.label: Event Ticket
ticket.description: Digital tickets for events, concerts, and conferences. Scan at the door with QR codes — includes date, venue, and seat details.
ticket.alt: Event ticket pass with QR code and event details

access.label: Access Pass
access.description: Grant or deny access to facilities, co-working spaces, and parking areas. Track entry logs and manage permissions digitally.

transit.label: Transit Pass
transit.description: Digital transit passes for buses, trains, and ferries. Board and exit tracking with route and zone information built in.
transit.alt: Transit pass showing route and zone information

businessId.label: Business ID
businessId.description: Digital employee or contractor ID cards. Verify identity on the spot with QR scan — includes role, department, and expiry.
businessId.alt: Business ID card with employee details

testimonials.title: Loved by business owners

maria.name: Maria Santos
maria.quote: We replaced our old paper punch cards and saw 3x more repeat visits in the first month. The wallet passes are beautiful and customers actually keep them.

james.name: James Chen
james.quote: Setup took literally 5 minutes. Our staff loves how easy it is to register visits, and customers love the digital cards. No more lost punch cards.

sophie.name: Sophie Dubois
sophie.quote: The analytics alone are worth it. I finally know which customers are my regulars and can reward them properly. Revenue from repeat customers is up 40%.

luca.name: Luca Moretti
luca.quote: We went from zero to 850 loyalty members in three months. The QR code at the counter does all the work — customers sign up themselves.

aisha.name: Aisha Patel
aisha.quote: Our redemption rate went from 15% with paper cards to 92% with Loyalshy. Digital passes actually get used because they're always in the customer's phone.

thomas.name: Thomas Bergstrom
thomas.quote: We used to spend hours managing punch cards and tracking rewards manually. Loyalshy automated everything. My staff can focus on what matters — great food.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Loyalshy
faq.replyTime: — we typically reply within a few hours.

howWorks.question: How does Loyalshy work?
howWorks.answer: Loyalshy replaces paper punch cards with digital loyalty cards that live in your customers' Apple or Google Wallet. You set up your business, print a QR code, and customers scan it to get their digital pass. Staff register visits from the dashboard, and customers automatically earn rewards.

devices.question: What devices are supported?
devices.answer: Loyalshy works with Apple Wallet (iPhone, Apple Watch) and Google Wallet (Android). The passes automatically update whenever a visit is registered — no app download required for customers.

setup.question: How long does setup take?
setup.answer: Most businesses are up and running in under 5 minutes. Create your account, customize your loyalty program, print your QR code, and you're ready to go.

passTypes.question: What types of passes can I create?
passTypes.answer: Loyalshy supports 10 pass types: stamp cards, coupons, memberships, points programs, prepaid cards, gift cards, tickets, access passes, transit passes, and business IDs. Each type has its own set of features and interactions.

freePlan.question: Is there a free plan?
freePlan.answer: Yes! Our Free plan lets you get started with up to 50 contacts and 1 program — choose a stamp card or coupon. No credit card required, free forever. Upgrade anytime when you need more.

cancel.question: How do I cancel?
cancel.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your billing settings. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption, secure authentication, and your data is stored on enterprise-grade infrastructure. We never share your customer data with third parties.

customize.question: Can I customize the loyalty card design?
customize.answer: Yes! Our visual studio lets you upload your logo, set brand colors, choose patterns, and fully customize how your wallet passes look. Every pass matches your business's identity.

tryDemo.title: Add a pass to your wallet
tryDemo.subtitle: See how it feels for your customers. Scan the QR code or tap a button to add a demo loyalty card to your Apple or Google Wallet.

privacy.section1P1: Loyalshy ("we", "us", "our") operates a digital wallet pass platform at loyalshy.com. We help businesses create and manage Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes for loyalty programs, memberships, coupons, tickets, and more.
privacy.section1P2: For privacy inquiries, contact us at
privacy.section2AccountDataContent: When you register, we collect your name, email address, and password (hashed). If you create an organization, we store business name and branding assets.
privacy.section2ContactDataContent: Businesses using our platform may add contacts (their customers) with names, email addresses, and phone numbers to issue digital passes.
privacy.section2UsageDataContent: We collect anonymized page views via Plausible Analytics, which does not use cookies and does not track personal data.
privacy.section2PaymentDataContent: Payment processing is handled entirely by Stripe. We store your Stripe customer ID and subscription status but never store card numbers or bank details.
privacy.section2TechnicalDataContent: Error reports are collected via Sentry for debugging purposes and may include IP addresses, browser type, and request details. These are retained for 30 days.
privacy.section3Item1: To provide and maintain the Loyalshy platform
privacy.section3Item2: To generate and deliver digital wallet passes (Apple Wallet, Google Wallet)
privacy.section3Item3: To send transactional emails (pass delivery, account notifications) via Resend
privacy.section3Item4: To process payments and manage subscriptions via Stripe
privacy.section3Item5: To monitor and fix errors via Sentry
privacy.section3Item6: To improve our product based on anonymized usage patterns
privacy.section4Intro: We share data with the following services, each operating under their own privacy policies:
privacy.section4Item3: Cloudflare R2 — File storage (logos, images) via S3-compatible API
privacy.section4Item5: Plausible Analytics — Privacy-first website analytics (no cookies, no personal data)
privacy.section4Item6: Apple Wallet / Google Wallet — Digital pass generation and delivery
privacy.section5P1: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Contact data is retained as long as the organization account exists. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.section5P2: Error logs (Sentry) are retained for 30 days. Analytics data (Plausible) is aggregated and contains no personal information.
privacy.section6Intro: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to:
privacy.section6Item1: Access — Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy.section6Item2: Rectification — Ask us to correct inaccurate data
privacy.section6Item3: Erasure — Ask us to delete your personal data
privacy.section6Item4: Portability — Request your data in a machine-readable format
privacy.section6Item5: Restriction — Ask us to limit how we use your data
privacy.section6Item6: Objection — Object to our processing of your data
privacy.section6Outro: To exercise any of these rights, email
privacy.section7P1: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, hashed passwords, secure session management, and role-based access controls. API keys are stored as SHA-256 hashes.
privacy.section8P1: Loyalshy is not intended for use by individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
privacy.section9P1: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email.
privacy.section10P1: For any questions about this privacy policy, contact us at

terms.section1P1: By accessing or using Loyalshy ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.section2P1: Loyalshy is a digital wallet pass platform that enables businesses to create, manage, and distribute Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes. The platform supports stamp cards, coupons, memberships, points programs, prepaid passes, gift cards, tickets, access passes, transit passes, and business IDs.
terms.section3P1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.
terms.section3P2: Each organization on Loyalshy operates as a separate tenant. Organization owners are responsible for managing team members and their access levels.
terms.section4Item1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
terms.section4Item2: Upload malicious content or attempt to compromise system security
terms.section4Item3: Exceed your plan's usage limits through automated means
terms.section4Item4: Resell or redistribute the Service without authorization
terms.section4Item5: Collect personal data through the platform without the consent of the data subjects
terms.section4Item6: Create passes that impersonate other businesses or mislead consumers
terms.section5P1: Loyalshy offers Free, Pro, Business, Scale, and Enterprise plans. Paid plans are billed monthly or annually via Stripe. Prices are in EUR. You may cancel your subscription at any time, which will downgrade your account to the Free plan at the end of the current billing period.
terms.section5P2: We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice to existing customers.
terms.section6P1: You retain ownership of all content and data you upload to Loyalshy. We do not claim any intellectual property rights over your business data, logos, images, or contact lists.
terms.section6P2: You grant us a limited license to process your data solely for the purpose of providing the Service, including generating wallet passes and sending transactional communications on your behalf.
terms.section7P1: Access to the Loyalshy REST API is subject to rate limits based on your plan. API keys are organization-scoped and must be kept confidential. We reserve the right to revoke API access for abusive usage patterns.
terms.section8P1: We aim to maintain high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We are not liable for any downtime, data loss, or service interruptions. We will make reasonable efforts to notify users of scheduled maintenance.
terms.section9P1: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your data will be deleted within 30 days unless retention is required by law.
terms.section10P1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Loyalshy shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.section11P1: These terms shall be governed by the laws of the European Union. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of the jurisdiction where Loyalshy is registered.
terms.section12P1: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email to registered users at least 30 days before taking effect.
terms.section13P1: For questions about these terms, contact us at

cookies.section1P1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to site owners.
cookies.section2EssentialIntro: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function and cannot be disabled.
cookies.section2SessionCookieContent: Maintains your login session and authentication state. Set by Better Auth. Expires when your session ends or after the configured session lifetime.
cookies.section2OrgCookieContent: Remembers which organization you are currently working in. Required for multi-tenant functionality.
cookies.section2ThemeCookieContent: Stores your light/dark mode preference. Set by next-themes. Persists until changed.
cookies.section2AnalyticsContent: We use Plausible Analytics for website analytics. Plausible is a privacy-first analytics service that does not use cookies, does not collect personal data, and does not track users across websites. No consent is required for Plausible under GDPR.
cookies.section3StripeContent: When you access the billing or checkout pages, Stripe may set cookies for fraud prevention and payment processing. These are governed by
cookies.section3NoTracking: We do not use any advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or social media cookies.
cookies.section4P1: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, blocking essential cookies will prevent you from using the Loyalshy dashboard.
cookies.section4P2: Since we only use essential cookies (no tracking or advertising cookies), no cookie consent banner is required under GDPR. Essential cookies are exempt from consent requirements as they are strictly necessary for the service to function.
cookies.section5P1: We may update this cookie policy if we introduce new cookie categories. We will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.
cookies.section6P1: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at
